title: edgerun-mesh-map · physical sensor recon on rocky

nodes.title: operator request
nodes.subtitle: edgerun all hardware sensors on rocky → nodal map
nodes.description: Map every device discoverable from Rocky via physical sensors (wifi, bt, nfc, anything). Layer wifi neighbors as toggleable. Visualize as floating nodal graph (Obsidian-style).

nodes.title: scope sensors
nodes.subtitle: inventory what Rocky can actually probe
nodes.description: Confirmed: wifi (netsh+WlanScan), BT paired (PnP), LAN (NetNeighbor), USB (PnP). Skipped: live BLE (needs WinRT), mDNS/SSDP (no native CLI), NFC (no reader).

nodes.title: pick visualization
nodes.subtitle: d3-force over cytoscape — Obsidian feel
nodes.description: processFlow rejected: static. cytoscape rejected: settles. d3-force = continuous physics, drag-to-grab/release-to-float.

nodes.title: build mesh-viewer.html
nodes.subtitle: single-file, dark cyberpunk, layer toggles, click-for-meta
nodes.description: Sidebar layer toggles (wifi-neighbor off by default), search filter, force simulation with low alphaDecay so nodes keep gentle motion, glow filter on circles.

nodes.title: probe — wifi
nodes.subtitle: WlanScan via P/Invoke + netsh parse
nodes.description: WlanOpenHandle → WlanEnumInterfaces → WlanScan per iface → 4s wait → netsh wlan show networks mode=bssid. Parses SSID/BSSID/signal%/channel/radio per AP.

nodes.title: probe — bluetooth
nodes.subtitle: Get-PnpDevice -Class Bluetooth
nodes.description: Paired/cached devices only. Live BLE scan deferred (needs WinRT BluetoothLEAdvertisementWatcher).

nodes.title: probe — LAN
nodes.subtitle: Get-NetNeighbor + default route filter
nodes.description: ARP/neighbor table, filtered to default-route interface, excludes multicast/link-local.

nodes.title: probe — USB
nodes.subtitle: Get-PnpDevice VID/PID parse
nodes.description: Filters out hubs/composites/roots. Parses VID and PID from InstanceId.

nodes.title: emit mesh.json + mesh-data.js
nodes.subtitle: UTF-8 no BOM, baked script tag for file:// auto-load
nodes.description: viewer can't fetch() over file://, so probe also writes mesh-data.js setting window.MESH_DATA. Viewer prefers it over SAMPLE.

nodes.title: munch viewer
nodes.subtitle: opera-pocket, ork profile, surfaced to ork's display
nodes.description: Frameless Qt host, per-nomen QWebEngineProfile, lands on the ork-tagged WT virtual desktop.

nodes.title: picass0 — ork watching bots
nodes.subtitle: GPU wake + render in parallel
nodes.description: Twink shadowrunner Nick Robinson, cybernetic implants, leaning back at a wall of holo-displays with spider-drone bots scuttling across.

nodes.title: ship
nodes.subtitle: 33 nodes mapped · viewer + image on screen · manifest updated
nodes.description: filed at .artificer/.soundings/edgerun-mesh-map/. Probe is re-runnable — refresh anytime to update the graph.
